calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-20-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-08-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-25-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Set For Trial On Apr-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-18-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 306

Mtn To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Req.'S For Production, And For A Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Amelia D. Yaros, Esq., for defendant and moving party: PG&E
No other appearances.

After hearing, Defendant City And County Of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production; And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
